05
Examples

Work Samples

Real workflows, automations, and campaign results from client engagements

Stale Deal: Under Negotiation Follow-Up

Automated 3, 7, and 14-day follow-up sequence with delays, branches, and task creation for deals stuck in negotiation stage.

Deal Management

Deal Movement to Estimate Sent

Triggers on appointment completion, uses branching logic to route deals after estimate is sent or if negotiation is required.

Pipeline Automation

Deal Owner Set to Meeting Host

Automatically assigns deal ownership to the person who hosted the most recent meeting, with qualification status updates.

Sales Handoff

Assign Deal Owner Based on Traffic Source

Uses branching logic to detect if contact owner is known, then creates deals and rotates contacts between 2 owners based on traffic source.

Lead Routing

Move Deal from Lead to Contacted Awaiting Reply

Monitors deal stage changes and sales activity, automatically progresses qualified leads through the pipeline with delay-based logic.

Stage Progression

Deal Movement to Estimate Scheduled

Triggers when appointment is set and deal is in contacted awaiting reply stage, moves deal to estimate scheduled with 3-minute delay.

Appointment Tracking

New Lead & Deal Notification Alert

Creates tasks, sends internal and in-app notifications when new deals are created, includes branch logic for enrollment criteria.

Internal Notifications

Stale Deal in Contacted Awaiting Reply

2-day delay with branch logic to check if deal is still stale, creates follow-up tasks if no sales activity detected.

Follow-Up Automation

Closed Won Deal Movement

Final stage workflow with Yes/No branch logic, moves won deals to closed status with 2-minute processing delay.

Deal Closure

Post Appointment Notification & Task Creation

Triggers after appointments, sends notifications, creates tasks, and uses branch logic to qualify deals still in pipeline.

Post-Meeting Automation

Missing Email on Active Deal - 24hr SLA

Monitors email contact activity with branch logic, creates tasks if no email contact detected within 24-hour SLA window.

SLA Monitoring

PaintScout to HubSpot Deal Sync

7-step Zapier workflow: Quote status changed in PaintScout → Find quote → Delay → Format numbers → Filter conditions → Find HubSpot deal → Update deal with estimate status.

Integration Automation
